biological_replicate: validated in lean healthy subjects from GENE (N = 25) and obese subjects from the Penn Human Adipose Resource (HAR) (N = 39).
experimental_design: linc-ADAIN KD increases KLF5 and interleukin-8 (IL-8) mRNA stability compared to implanted control adipocytes
number_of_fractions: Following fractionation of mature primary human ASC adipocytes
